title: pediomelum latestipulatum var. latestipulatum
intro: Pediomelum latestipulatum var. latestipulatum, also known as the Rocky Mountain larkspur, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the nervous system and induce a sedative effect. The health benefits of Pediomelum latestipulatum var. latestipulatum include its use as a treatment for insomnia, anxiety, and restlessness, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its roots and flowers, which can be dried, powdered, and taken as a tea or used in tinctures and infusions.
